'''ngajono''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:noctambulo|noctambulo]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ng-j-n
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:noctambulo|noctambulo]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| ngajono
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:ngæjeneth|ngæjeneth]] || [[word:ngæjenej|ngæjenej]] || [[word:ngæjenesh|ngæjenesh]] || [[word:ngæjene|ngæjene]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:ngajojonoth|ngajojonoth]] || [[word:ngajojonoj|ngajojonoj]] || [[word:ngajojonosh|ngajojonosh]] || [[word:ngajojono|ngajojono]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:ngajonoth|ngajonoth]] || [[word:ngajonoj|ngajonoj]] || [[word:ngajonosh|ngajonosh]] || [[word:ngajono|ngajono]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:ngajofnoth|ngajofnoth]] || [[word:ngajofnoj|ngajofnoj]] || [[word:ngajofnosh|ngajofnosh]] || [[word:ngajofnof|ngajofnof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:ngajonotho|ngajonotho]] || [[word:ngajonojo|ngajonojo]] || [[word:ngajonosho|ngajonosho]] || [[word:ngajonoko|ngajonoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:ngajonoth|ngajonoth]] || [[word:ngajonoj|ngajonoj]] || [[word:ngajonosh|ngajonosh]] || [[word:ngajono|ngajono]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:ngajonothol|ngajonothol]] || [[word:ngajonojol|ngajonojol]] || [[word:ngajonoshol|ngajonoshol]] || [[word:ngajonokol|ngajonokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:ngajonothotho|ngajonothotho]] || [[word:ngajonojojo|ngajonojojo]] || [[word:ngajonoshosho|ngajonoshosho]] || [[word:ngajonoko|ngajonoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:ngajonothon|ngajonothon]] || [[word:ngajonojon|ngajonojon]] || [[word:ngajonoshon|ngajonoshon]] || [[word:ngajonokon|ngajonokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:ngajonothoro|ngajonothoro]] || [[word:ngajonojoro|ngajonojoro]] || [[word:ngajonoshoro|ngajonoshoro]] || [[word:ngajonokoro|ngajonokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|97f1258}}
